Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Tranquil Path
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +66% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +19% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +90% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 27(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Prefix Modifier "Penetrating" (Tier: 1) }
Monster Damage Penetrates 12(12-14)% Elemental Resistances
{ Prefix Modifier "Frostbitten" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 16(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Cold
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 100(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
{ Suffix Modifier "Sleet" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Chilled Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 25(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
